title: Baker Ross FX590 Ceramic Garden Fairies - Box of 4, Ceramic Model Painting for Kids
features: Models to Paint: Create your own fairy garden with these ceramic fairy models. This multipack of fairies are complete with their own wings, toadstool and cute flower decorations

Arts and Crafts: Kids can decorate these blank models with their own colours and patterns. These plain models are ideal for decorating and embellishing. Kids are sure to enjoy painting pixies as a fun craft activity, rainy day entertainment, or at home craft project

Paint Your Own: Kids can decorate these fairies with Baker Ross porcelain paint pens or acrylic paint (not included) For extra protection, add a coat of our Acrylic Varnish (FE585). Finished fairies are perfect for using an outside ornament or decoration
Included in the Pack: This pack contains 4 models. Model size 11cm x 7.5cm x 6.5cm

Made by Experts: Baker Ross has been designing and providing the very best art and craft supplies, and toys to schools, groups and parents for over 40 years. All products conform to General Product Safety Regulations, and state age recommendation where applicable.
description: From the manufacturer Fairy Characters Paint a range of adorable characters including pixies and fairies to create your own fantasy garden. Use Baker Ross porcelain paint to make these characters come alive (FC744) (not included) Fairy Garden Craft Kits Accessorise your garden with Baker Ross Fairy garden wood kits including doors, fairy landing pads, and ceramics Garden Making Accessories Creative kids are sure to enjoy making their own fairy scene.
